mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, p.user_id AS p_user_id, p.status AS p_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT c.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, p.user_id AS p_user_id, p.status AS p_status FROM cart c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
